organization.name: Acme Legacy Systems Inc.
organization.description: A company that has neglected cybersecurity investments for years

asset_management.notes: No formal asset inventory exists. IT discovers devices ad-hoc when issues arise.

business_environment.notes: Critical business processes are not documented. No supply chain risk assessment.

governance.notes: No dedicated security team. IT handles security reactively.

risk_assessment.notes: No formal risk assessments conducted. Management unaware of threat landscape.

risk_management_strategy.notes: No documented risk management strategy or acceptance criteria.

access_control.notes: Shared admin accounts common. Passwords on sticky notes observed.

awareness_training.notes: No security awareness program. Employees click on everything.

data_security.notes: Sensitive data stored in plaintext on shared drives accessible to all employees.

information_protection.notes: No hardening standards. Default configurations used on all systems.

maintenance.notes: Systems often 2+ years behind on patches. No maintenance windows.

protective_technology.notes: Flat network. Single firewall with default rules from 2018.

anomalies_and_events.notes: No baseline of normal activity. Would not detect anomalies.

security_monitoring.notes: No centralized logging. Logs disabled on most systems to 'improve performance'.

detection_processes.notes: No detection capabilities. Breaches discovered by customers or law enforcement.

response_planning.notes: No documented incident response plan. Chaos during incidents.

communications.notes: No breach notification procedures. Previous incident disclosed via Twitter rumor.

analysis.notes: No forensic tools or expertise. Evidence routinely destroyed.

mitigation.notes: Standard response is to 'turn it off and on again' or reimage.

improvements.notes: Same incidents repeat. No post-incident reviews conducted.

recovery_planning.notes: No formal recovery plans. Would take weeks to recover from major incident.

improvements.notes: Recovery procedures untested. Last attempted restore failed.

backups.notes: Backups stored on same network as production. Ransomware would encrypt both.

recent_incidents.detection_method: Discovered when vendor reported fraudulent wire request

budget.notes: Security seen as cost center. All requests denied.
